data.name: Hentai Age Scientist
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a relaxing and enchanting puzzle adventure where every completed level reveals a stunning image of a lovely girl. Enjoy a peaceful, immersive atmosphere as you carefully arrange the pieces to slowly uncover each artwork.

Play at your own pace with absolutely no timers or pressure—just smooth, calming gameplay designed for pure enjoyment. Whether you’re a casual player or a true puzzle enthusiast, the game offers soothing visuals and a gentle experience you can return to anytime.

Key Features

Unlock charming illustrations: Reveal new, beautifully crafted portraits of girls as you progress.

Calming soundscape: Gentle background music creates a serene and comforting ambiance.

Complete image gallery: View every finished artwork in full detail after solving each puzzle.

Endless stages: Progress through numerous levels with gradually increasing challenge.

data.short_description: Enjoy a relaxing puzzle journey where each solved level reveals beautiful girl artwork, offering calm visuals, gentle gameplay, no timers, no pressure, and a peaceful experience playable anytime for everyone.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 芬蘭文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
